{{Expand}}

{{Infobox artifact
| name = Totem
| introduced = cradle-08-wintersteel
}}

== Wintersteel ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|The [[Totem]] inside Sophara carried an echo of the power in front of her.<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c25">''Wintersteel'', chapter 25</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Cradle nav}}

[[Category:Artifacts]]
[[Category:Wintersteel]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
[[Category:Cradle artifacts]]
